name: Slaad Tadpole

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

text:
# Slaad Tadpole

*Tiny Aberration, Chaotic Neutral*

The larval form of a slaad, chewed free of its host and already hungry.

### Actions

**Bite.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.
